theme: stiffening a bridge against a marching drum corps
title: Drum-Corps Bridge: Band-Gap Stiffness Allocation
strategies: uniform stiffness spread over all segments (baseline, ~0.1 -- exactly the spectrum the comb was planted on)
marginal-gain greedy fill: repeatedly add one budget unit to whichever single segment most reduces resonance (localized defect patches, gets stuck)
periodic (period-P) stiffness modulation that opens a genuine band gap at the comb's heavy band -- the intended insight
open: hybrid periodic + local-search refinement, non-uniform period schedules, chirped modulation
